channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: "Clock Is ticking": Trump Warns 'Nothing Will Be Left' Of Iran Without Deal
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report

media:content.media:description: A widespread police manhunt was under way.

item.description: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report
item.content:encoded: 4 Dead, 8 Injured As Gunman Opens Fire In Southern Turkey: Report

item.title: Oil Prices Dip After Report Of US Suspending Iranian Crude Sanctions

media:content.media:description: Brent crude, West Texas Intermediate prices fell on Monday.

item.description: The unconfirmed report by Iranian media cited an unnamed source, but analysts and traders seized on the news.
item.content:encoded: The unconfirmed report by Iranian media cited an unnamed source, but analysts and traders seized on the news.

item.title: No Ebola Case In India, Airports Put On Alert After WHO Warning
item.description: The Centre has reviewed standard operating procedures for screening, surveillance, quarantine and case management, while laboratory preparedness is also being ramped up. The National Institute of Virology (NIV), Pune has been designated for Ebola tes
item.content:encoded: The Centre has reviewed standard operating procedures for screening, surveillance, quarantine and case management, while laboratory preparedness is also being ramped up. The National Institute of Virology (NIV), Pune has been designated for Ebola tes

item.title: Iran Announces New Body To Give "Real-Time Updates" On Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most strategically vital maritime routes. (File)

item.description: Iran has largely blocked shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz since the outbreak of war with the United States and Israel on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Iran has largely blocked shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz since the outbreak of war with the United States and Israel on February 28.

item.title: PM Modi Receives Norway's Highest Civilian Honour, 32nd Global Award For Him

media:content.media:description: It is awarded for exceptional service in advancing Norway's interests and international relations.

item.description: The Grand Cross is the highest grade of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1100986/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Grand Cross is the highest grade of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit.

item.title: The Missile Is Dead. Long Live The Map: How Iran Invented 'Future Of War'
item.description: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.
item.content:encoded: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.

item.title: "Grown Bit Too Complex": Ikea To Cut 850 Jobs At Parent Company

media:content.media:description: Ikea said the job cuts were necessary to simpify its structure.

item.description: Of the 850 staff positions being cut, around 300 will be in Sweden based on current plans, Inter Ikea said. The company reported a 32% drop in profit in FY25.
item.content:encoded: Of the 850 staff positions being cut, around 300 will be in Sweden based on current plans, Inter Ikea said. The company reported a 32% drop in profit in FY25.

item.title: Pak, Mediator For Iran, Deploys Thousands Of Troops, Jets In Saudi: Report

media:content.media:description: Pakistan has deployed 16 aircraft to Saudi Arabia, mostly JF-17 fighters. (Reuters)

item.description: Pakistan has deployed a full squadron of around 16 aircraft, mostly JF-17 fighters made jointly with China. The deployment includes around 8,000 troops.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has deployed a full squadron of around 16 aircraft, mostly JF-17 fighters made jointly with China. The deployment includes around 8,000 troops.

item.title: Bodies Of Missing Italian Divers Found Inside 60-Metre Cave After Maldives Scuba Disaster

media:content.media:description: Cave diving is widely regarded as one of the most dangerous forms of scuba diving.

item.description: The incident is believed to be the deadliest single diving accident in the Maldives, a country known globally for its coral islands and luxury diving tourism.
item.content:encoded: The incident is believed to be the deadliest single diving accident in the Maldives, a country known globally for its coral islands and luxury diving tourism.

item.title: PM Modi Holds Talks With Norwegian Counterpart On Trade, Green Technology

media:content.media:description: PM Modi will call on King Harald V and Queen Sonja.

item.description: PM Modi will also address the India-Norway Business and Research Summit along with the Norwegian Prime Minister.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi will also address the India-Norway Business and Research Summit along with the Norwegian Prime Minister.

item.title: Meet Tushar Kumar, 23, UK's Youngest Indian-Origin Mayor

media:content.media:description: Tushar Kumar took charge as the Mayor of Elstree and Borehamwood at a ceremony last week.

item.description: The Labour councillor joined the Elstree and Borehamwood Town Council in 2023 and previously served in the role of Deputy Mayor.
item.content:encoded: The Labour councillor joined the Elstree and Borehamwood Town Council in 2023 and previously served in the role of Deputy Mayor.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | PNS Hangor: Inside The $5 Billion Submarine Fleet Pakistan Is Buying From China
item.description: With the commissioning of PNS Hangor, what is no longer open to debate is the proposition that any future India-Pakistan conflict, in terms of force composition, will be a proxy engagement involving Chinese military technology.
item.content:encoded: With the commissioning of PNS Hangor, what is no longer open to debate is the proposition that any future India-Pakistan conflict, in terms of force composition, will be a proxy engagement involving Chinese military technology.

item.title: Global Health Alert: WHO Assembly Begins Amid Hantavirus And Ebola Outbreaks
item.description: World Health Organization member states gather for their annual meeting in Geneva Monday amid concern over deadly hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks and uncertainty over...
item.content:encoded: World Health Organization member states gather for their annual meeting in Geneva Monday amid concern over deadly hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks and uncertainty over...

item.title: Video: Anchor Fires AK-47 On Live TV As Iran Gives Weapon Training To Civilians

media:content.media:description: Defence training sessions on light weapons were organised for civilians at mosques

item.description: The state television reportedly aired clips of the training sessions, saying they were part of 'public readiness to defend the country'.
item.content:encoded: The state television reportedly aired clips of the training sessions, saying they were part of 'public readiness to defend the country'.

item.title: Trump Averages 40-60 Trades Per Day: Wall Street Sees A Sketchy Pattern

media:content.media:description: Legally, US Presidents can trade stocks. The debate is about whether this should be happening at all.

item.description: The White House says there is no conflict. The Trump Organization says the trades are executed by third-party institutions using automated systems.
item.content:encoded: The White House says there is no conflict. The Trump Organization says the trades are executed by third-party institutions using automated systems.

item.title: Leaked 'Cypher' Shows Pak Ousted Ex-PM Imran Khan To Get US Favour

media:content.media:description: Khan, 73, was removed on April 9, 2022, in a no-confidence vote backed by Pakistan's military.

item.description: The former Pakistani Prime Minister has repeatedly claimed that the United States has conspired with Pakistan's opposition parties to remove him because of his independent foreign policy and refusal to fully align with Washington against Russia and C
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1100883/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The former Pakistani Prime Minister has repeatedly claimed that the United States has conspired with Pakistan's opposition parties to remove him because of his independent foreign policy and refusal to fully align with Washington against Russia and C

item.title: How A Firm Tried To Fix Goldman Sachs Executive's Epstein-Linked Image

media:content.media:description: The company reportedly created a personal website and LinkedIn page for Kathryn Ruemmler

item.description: The report said Terakeet then spent nearly 20 months trying to reduce the impact of the negative publicity.
item.content:encoded: The report said Terakeet then spent nearly 20 months trying to reduce the impact of the negative publicity.

item.title: How A Shepherd Uncovered Two Israeli Outposts In Iraq Before Being Killed

media:content.media:description: A shepherd leads his herd through the Najaf desert in southwestern Iraq

item.description: The incident took place on March 3 near the remote town of al-Nukhaib in Iraq’s western desert.
item.content:encoded: The incident took place on March 3 near the remote town of al-Nukhaib in Iraq’s western desert.

item.title: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Steams Towards Rotterdam At Voyage End
item.description: A cruise ship that sparked global alarm after a deadly outbreak of hantavirus made its final approach to Rotterdam Monday, with the remaining skeleton...
item.content:encoded: A cruise ship that sparked global alarm after a deadly outbreak of hantavirus made its final approach to Rotterdam Monday, with the remaining skeleton...
